text:
The arXiv ID 2503.11094 does exist, but it corresponds to a paper titled **"Open3D-VQA"** (not "Open3dvqa"), authored by **Weichen Zhang** et al. — not the cited authors (Weichen Zhan, Zile Zhou, Zhiheng Zheng, Chen Gao, Jinqiang Cui, Yong Li, Xinlei Chen, Xiao-Ping Zhang). The v1 PDF at arxiv.org/pdf/2503.11094v1 shows an earlier version titled "Open3DVQA" with different content and a different set of authors. The paper has undergone significant revision across versions (changing name, scope, and author list). The cited authors partially overlap with the real paper (Chen Gao, Jinqiang Cui, Yong Li, Xinlei Chen, Xiao-Ping Zhang do appear in the GitHub BibTeX), but the first author "Weichen Zhan" does not match "Weichen Zhang" — this appears to be a minor name typo/variant, and the overall author list is substantially overlapping. The title in the citation uses "multi-modal" (hyphenated) vs. "Multimodal," which is a minor formatting difference.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2503.11094 corresponds to a real paper on this exact topic; the v1 version was titled "Open3DVQA: A Benchmark for Comprehensive Spatial Reasoning with Multimodal Large Language Model in Open Space" and the author list substantially overlaps with the cited authors. The first-author name difference ("Weichen Zhan" vs. "Weichen Zhang") appears to be a minor typo, and the title formatting difference ("multi-modal" vs. "Multimodal") is trivial.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.11094
